headline: Saturday matters: stop gaining, start losing now
summary: You're gaining +0.07 kg/week when you need -0.71 kg/week; today's discipline determines if this week reverses the trend.
details: Commit to Huel meals only and zero emotional snacking—portion control is non-negotiable today. Hit your rowing machine for 45 minutes to break the sedentary pattern and reset this week. Your current +0.5 kg/month trajectory means 6 kg gained instead of 33 kg lost by June 2027; today's Saturday choice compounds this gap.
